name: chr4q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 4 q-arm pericentric flank (4q11-4q12), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Contains alpha-satellite (D4Z1), pericentromeric SDs, and approaches the FIP1L1-PDGFRA region distally. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline on the q-side; distal edge contains KIT/PDGFRA upstream regulatory landscape.
